title: Epic of My Fantasy
description: Add some Final FantasyXIV elements to Minecraft
body:
Introduce some FFXIV elements to Minecraft.The mod aimed at providing various challenge bosses from final fantasy xiv for servers,so in order to avoid break the environment of server,many items dont have ways to get without cheating.Owners or operators could DIY the method of handing them.
Provide raid bosses like zenos and garuda,duel bosses like raubahnr and an original bosses shadow of Chicora-The sword champion.
Skills from pve and pvp,like superbolide,Zantetsuken and so on.
If you setup AttributeFix mod,some bosses like zenos' hp will reach 500k.
Had better use this mod with other mods,you may could not deal with the bosses here with only this mod.
